records.question: What is our total billed revenue?

trace.sql: SELECT sum(amount) as total_amount FROM invoices;
SELECT sum(amount) as total_valid_amount FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our billed revenue broken down by account region?

trace.sql:
SELECT
    a.region,
    SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM accounts a
JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

SELECT
    a.region,
    SUM(ili.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM accounts a
JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id
JOIN invoice_line_items ili ON i.invoice_id = ili.invoice_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

records.question: How much have we collected in payments so far?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM payments;

records.question: What is our billed revenue by payment method?

trace.sql: SELECT method, sum(amount) as revenue FROM payments GROUP BY method;

records.question: What is our current monthly recurring revenue (MRR)?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(mrr_amount) FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our MRR broken down by plan tier?

trace.sql: SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(s.mrr_amount) AS total_mrr FROM accounts a JOIN subscriptions s ON a.account_id = s.account_id WHERE s.canceled_at IS NULL GROUP BY a.plan_tier ORDER BY total_mrr DESC;

records.question: How many active subscriptions do we have?

trace.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is the total usage, in units, per subscription?

trace.sql: SELECT * FROM usage_events LIMIT 5;
SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT account_id), COUNT(DISTINCT subscription_id) FROM subscriptions;
SELECT * FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL LIMIT 5;
SELECT SUM(units) FROM usage_events;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our billed revenue from enterprise accounts?

trace.sql: SELECT DISTINCT plan_tier FROM accounts;

SELECT sum(i.amount) as billed_revenue_exclude_voided, sum(CASE WHEN i.voided_at IS NULL THEN i.amount ELSE 0 END) as billed_revenue_only_valid FROM invoices i JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id WHERE a.plan_tier = 'enterprise';
SELECT sum(amount) FROM invoices i JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id WHERE a.plan_tier = 'enterprise' AND i.voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: How much revenue did we bill in each region, counting only invoices that were paid?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) 
FROM accounts a 
JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id 
WHERE i.invoice_id IN (SELECT invoice_id FROM payments) 
GROUP BY a.region

SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) 
FROM accounts a 
JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id 
WHERE i.invoice_id IN (SELECT invoice_id FROM payments) 
  AND i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region

records.question: What is the average invoice amount?

trace.sql: SELECT AVG(amount) FROM invoices;
SELECT AVG(amount) FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our total billed revenue per plan tier?

trace.sql: SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(i.amount) as total_billed FROM accounts a JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id GROUP BY a.plan_tier ORDER BY a.plan_tier;
SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(i.amount) as total_billed FROM accounts a JOIN invoices i ON a.account_id = i.account_id WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL GROUP BY a.plan_tier ORDER BY a.plan_tier;

records.question: How many distinct accounts have been billed?

trace.sql: SELECT count(distinct account_id) FROM invoices;
SELECT count(distinct account_id) FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our average billed revenue per account?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_accounts FROM accounts
SELECT SUM(amount) AS billed_revenue FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL
SELECT SUM(amount) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts) AS avg_billed_revenue FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice_line_items WHERE invoice_id IN (SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL
